name: Medivolve Inc.
summary: Medivolve Inc. is a principal investment firm. It is a social-impact investment focused company Investing resources, funds and bandwidth for the betterment of the human condition through medical sciences, climate change and technology. The firm was formerly known as Continent Resources Inc. and changed its name to Copper One Inc. in October 2009. Copper One Inc. was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
